calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hannah Salassi for and with Myrna Simon (Petitioner).

Ms. Salassi confirmed that distributions have been made without Court order, stated that Ms. Simon did not have legal guidance in the beginning, that she proceeded in good faith, that she proceeded on the terms of the Trust, that she carried out her Mother's wishes and that the only thing remaining is the statutory attorney's fees. Ms. Salassi also stated that the Children have agreed to pay the attorney's fees, that Ms. Simon is not collecting her fees, requested that the Court execute the proposed order for final distribution, confirm that the asset is an asset of the Trust pursuant to the terms of the Trust and stated that the $535.00 amount included the $500.00 filing fee and that they do not need a reserve. The Court granted the Third Amended Final Report and Petition for Confirmation of Trust Assets, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on November 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Third Amended Final Report, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Dec-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milla Lvovich for and with Myrna Simon.

The Court stated that it was expecting a petition for final distribution. Ms. Lvovich reported that she just came into the case, that she will file a substitution of attorney today and will work on the petition this week. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to December 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Nov-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Myrna Simon in Propria Persona.

The Court stated to Ms. Simon that at the last hearing she was told to have her attorney file a substitution of attorney. Ms. Simon stated that her attorney needs more time, that the attorney is local (Milla Lvovich) and that she has been retained. The Court asked if counsel gave Ms. Simon any information as to what she is to do and Ms. Simon responded no. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report as well as a Substitution of Attorney was continued to November 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Myrna Simon in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it needs a petition for final distribution. Ms. Simon reported that she now has an attorney from Legal Aid. The Court stated that the attorney will need to file a substitution of attorney and requested that Ms. Simon remind the attorney to do so. The status of filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of a status report was continued to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court took the Orders to Appear off Calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
